PremiumCode.title: Premium Code
PremiumCode.description: A code that grants premium access to a user.

used.description: Whether the code has been used.

usedBy.description: The IP or UID of the user who used it.

UserStatus.title: User Status
UserStatus.description: Stores premium status for a specific IP or UID.

/user_status/{userId}.description: Stores premium status indexed by IP or UID.
